overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a Western-themed video game showing a cowboy character walking through a moonlit rural settlement with teepees and wooden structures. The character approaches and circles an abandoned wooden cabin under a starry night sky with a bright full moon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with scattered wooden debris and teepees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the moonlit field toward the distant wooden cabin, passing fallen logs and wooden fences

entered.detail: dark wooden cabin with sloped roof silhouetted against the night sky
traditional cone-shaped tents with wooden poles extending upward
weathered wooden post fence running along the right side of the path
scattered wooden logs and timber debris lying on the grass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide moonlit grassland with a cowboy character walking toward a distant wooden cabin. Teepees stand on the left while a weathered wooden fence lines the right. The character moves steadily forward over dirt and grass, passing scattered fallen logs as the cabin gradually grows larger in the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching abandoned wooden cabin with rocky outcrops

events.description: character slows walking pace and looks around while approaching the cabin

agents.ego_description: slowing down to observe the surroundings while approaching the dark cabin, scanning the area cautiously

entered.detail: large rock formation rising behind the teepees on the left side
leafless tree trunk standing near the cabin
broken planks and wooden rubble scattered around the cabin perimeter

segments.scene_description: The character closes the distance to the wooden cabin, now dominating the center of the frame. The teepees and fence recede behind as rocky outcrops and a dead tree come into view. The character slows their pace around the 25-second mark, cautiously observing the abandoned structure and scattered debris before continuing.

scene_state.functional_zone: cabin exterior porch and entrance area

agents.ego_description: circling around the cabin toward the porch and entrance, moving along the building's exterior wall

entered.detail: raised wooden platform with steps leading to the cabin entrance
old wooden barrel sitting beside the cabin wall
collapsed section of wooden fence near the cabin
dark open doorway of the cabin revealing black interior

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the cabin and begins circling around its perimeter. The wooden porch and barrel come into view as the character moves along the building's side. The camera follows closely as the character approaches the dark doorway, with the cabin wall now filling the left side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a moonlit grassland that gradually closes in on a solitary, abandoned wooden cabin. It begins with a wide view of the cowboy walking past teepees and a weathered fence, moving steadily over dirt and grass as the distant structure grows larger in the frame. As the character closes the distance, the open landscape recedes to make way for rocky outcrops and a dead tree, with the character slowing their pace to cautiously observe the debris surrounding the building. The scene then shifts to a tighter perspective as the character reaches the cabin and begins circling its perimeter, passing a wooden porch and a barrel. Finally, the camera follows closely as the character approaches the dark doorway, with the weathered cabin wall filling the frame.
